content: Whiterun Guard: Gods, these fucking bandits get bolder every day. Just heard another patrol found a group of 'em rutting with Falmer near Whitewatch. Disgusting cunts, but at least they keep each other busy instead of raiding our roads. Whiterun Guard 2: Aye, better than finding 'em balls-deep in some poor farmer’s daughter, eh? Though I wouldn’t mind catching one o’ those milk-drinkers in the act—easy bounty when they’re too distracted to fight back. Whiterun Guard: Hah! Remember that Stormcloak deserter we caught last month? Bastard was halfway through fucking a mudcrab when we slit his throat. Should’ve let him finish—would’ve been a mercy compared to what Irileth did to him afterward. Whiterun Guard 2: Fuckin’ Dark Elves, man. Cold-blooded as a frostbite spider’s cunt. Bet she tore him a new one just for fun. Whiterun Guard: Speaking of—you hear about the brothel down in the Plains District? Some Breton bitch is offering “dragonborn specials” now. Swears she’s had every tongue-lashing from the Greybeards to the Thalmor. Whiterun Guard 2: Shit, for enough coin, I’d let her shout apart. Better than freezing my balls off on night watch.
Whiterun Guard: Heh, save your coin for mead, brother. shout session Whiterun Guard 2: Back in my day, we fought naked! Whiterun Guard: glory tale,
